name: nestjs-st
description: Monorepo: NestJS API + TanStack Start (Nx) - Blog/CMS learning track

scripts.format: prettier --write README.md package.json nx.json tsconfig.base.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc docs apps/api apps/web/src apps/web/public "apps/web/package.json" "apps/web/tsconfig.json" "apps/web/vite.config.ts" "apps/web/eslint.config.js" "apps/web/prettier.config.js" "apps/web/README.md" "apps/web/.cta.json" "apps/web/.vscode/settings.json"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check README.md package.json nx.json tsconfig.base.json eslint.config.mjs .prettierrc docs apps/api apps/web/src apps/web/public "apps/web/package.json" "apps/web/tsconfig.json" "apps/web/vite.config.ts" "apps/web/eslint.config.js" "apps/web/prettier.config.js" "apps/web/README.md" "apps/web/.cta.json" "apps/web/.vscode/settings.json"
